ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT HENSLEY, BRIDGET

436 CENTRAL BUILDING, ADAM BARASCH, ESQ. ET AL. VS. BRIDGET HENSLEY, ET AL. IN PRO PER 2:45 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFAULTED DEFENDANT, TODD WOODWORTH, SUED AS DOE 1. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. AGAINST DEFT. BRIDGET HENSLEY FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AT 436 CENTRAL STREET #2 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND THE LEASE IS DECLARED FORFEITED. DEFAULT HAVING BEEN ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT TODD WOODWORTH THERE IS NO OTHER ADULT IN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AS OF THE DATE OF THE SETTLEMENT CONF. PLTF. AWARDED PAST DUE RENT OF $2,049.37 AS WELL. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 5:00 P.M. ON 9/5/93. SECURITY DEPOSIT CREDITED TOWARD JUDGMENT AFTER DEDUCTIONS FOR ANY DAMAGE BEYOND REASONABLE WEAR AND TEAR. COST AND ATTORNEY FEES WAIVED. LELA HARRIS, PRO TEM JUDGE. JOHN LEWIS, REPORTER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENSLEY, BRIDGET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 436 CENTRAL STREET #2 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,049.37 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,049.37, STAYED UNTIL SEP-05-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH. STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 9/5/93 5:00 P.M. SECURITY DEPOSIT CREDITED TOWARDS JUDGMENT AFTER DEDUCTIONS FOR REPAIR. BRIDGET HENSLEY IS THE SOLE OCCUPANT OF THE PREMISE.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HENSLEY, BRIDGET
